title: Child development: fine motor and vision milestones
body_html:
The tables below summarises the major fine motor and vision developmental milestones

AgeMilestone
3 monthsReaches for object
6 monthsHolds in palmar grasp
Pass objects from one hand to another
10 monthsPincer grip

Bricks

AgeMilestone
18 monthsTower of 3
2 yearsTower of 6
3 yearsTower of 9

Drawing

AgeMilestone
2 yearsCopies line
3 yearsCopies circle
4 yearsCopies cross
5 yearsCopies square

Notes
  • hand preference before 12 months is abnormal and may indicate cerebral palsy
